company_profile.size_estimate: large, tens of thousands of employees globally
company_profile.business_model: Sells industrial automation and information hardware, software, and services to manufacturers.

signals.description: Continued public emphasis on expanding software and AI-enabled offerings within its industrial automation portfolio.

hypotheses.statement: Customers with a large existing installed hardware base may find it difficult to adopt newer AI-enabled software offerings without a modernization program.

evidence.source: general industry knowledge, unverified against a live dated source
evidence.evidence_text: Rockwell Automation is a large industrial automation vendor expanding its software and AI-enabled product lines.

reviewer_findings.reason: Hypothesis rests on a single unsupported evidence item — acceptable to keep as a hypothesis awaiting validation, but not yet strong enough to promote to an inference.
